zh.lifeSummary: William de Barri I是Odo de Barry的兒子，於大約1096年出生在威爾士布洛可爾曼諾比。他於1134年與Angharad de Windsor結婚。他們至少是9個兒子的父母。他去世於大約1166年在英國威爾斯布洛可爾曼諾比享年72歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: William de Barri I是Odo de Barry的儿子，于大约1096年出生在威尔士布洛可爾曼諾比。他于1134年与Angharad de Windsor结婚。他们至少是9个儿子的父母。他去世于大约1166年在英国威尔斯布洛可爾曼諾比享年72岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Barri
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Arabic: derivative of the placename Badr near Medina in Saudi Arabia, the location of a decisive battle in early Islamic history (634 AD ). Badr is also found as a personal name, and the surname may denote descent from or association with someone so called.
Indian: Tamil name of unexplained etymology.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: William de Barri I was born about 1096, in Manorbier, Pembrokeshire, Wales as the son of Odo de Barry. He married Angharad de Windsor in 1134. They were the parents of at least 9 sons. He died about 1166, in Manorbier, Pembrokeshire, Wales, United Kingdom, at the age of 72.

fr.lifeSummary: William de Barri I est né environ 1096, à Manorbier, Pembrokeshire, Galles, fils de Odo de Barry. Il a épousé Angharad de Windsor en 1134. Ils ont eu au moins 9 fils. Il est décédé environ 1166, à Manorbier, Pembrokeshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 72 ans.

de.lifeSummary: William de Barri I wurde um 1096 in Manorbier, Pembrokeshire, Wales, als Sohn von Odo de Barry geboren. Er hat 1134 Angharad de Windsor geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 9 Söhne. Er starb um 1166 im Alter von 72 Jahren in Manorbier, Pembrokeshire, Wales, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: William de Barri I è nato il circa 1096 nel Manorbier, Pembrokeshire, Galles come figlio di Odo de Barry. Lui sposato Angharad de Windsor nel 1134. Erano genitori di almeno 9 figli. Morì circa 1166, nel Manorbier, Pembrokeshire, Galles, Regno Unito, all'età di 72 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: William de Barri Iは約1096年にウェールズペンブロケシュアイアマノービエルでOdo de Barryの息子として生まれた。1134年にAngharad de Windsorと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも9人の息子の親であった。彼は約1166年にイギリスウェールズペンブロケシュアイアマノービエルで72歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: William de Barri I(은)는 대략 1096년 웨일스 p브로케실르 먼르비어에서 Odo de Barry의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1134년 Angharad de Windsor(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 아홉 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 대략 1166년 영국 웨일스 p브로케실르 먼르비어에서 72세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: William de Barri I родился около 1096 г. в местности манорбиир, пемброкешир, Уэльс. Его отца звали Odo de Barry. Он женился на женщине по имени Angharad de Windsor в 1134 г. У них было по крайней мере 9 сыновей. Он умер около 1166 г. в местности манорбиир, пемброкешир, Уэльс, Великобритания в возрасте 72 лет.
